steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content: Use the table points $(-3,0)$ and $(0,-15)$. The slope is $$m=\frac{-15-0}{0-(-3)}=-5.$$ Since the point $(0,-15)$ is the $y$-intercept, $b=-15$.

steps.title: Write and factor the function
steps.content: The line is $$f(x)=-5x-15.$$ Factor out $-5$: $$f(x)=-5(x+3).$$ That matches choice C, so C is correct.
